title: India's IT model worked, until AI. Disruption now haunts its sub-optimal equilibrium
description: India's IT sector thrived for decades by providing skilled labour at lower costs. This model is now challenged by Artificial Intelligence. AI is eroding the advantages of offshore services and complex task execution. India must now focus on innovation to build foundational technologies and secure its future in the global AI landscape. The old strategy is no longer sufficient.
content:

title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese firms 'exploiting' U.S. AI models
description: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies' exploitation of U.S. artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the U.S. in the AI race.
content:
WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies' exploitation of U.S. artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the U.S. in the AI race.

title: Meta Layoffs: Which Departments Will Be Affected, What Amount Will Laid Off Employees Receive
description: According to Meta, these changes aim to improve efficiency and strengthen its focus on artificial intelligence.

title: When your wife asks ChatGPT instead of you
description: A husband reflects on his wife’s growing reliance on artificial intelligence
content:
Sir, – I would not regard myself as a jealous husband. In all our years of marriage, I have never been tempted to inspect my wife’s phone or inquire too closely into her private correspondence.

title: Meta to layoff 8,000 from its workforce, amid AI spending push: Report
description: Meta is set to lay off around 8,000 employees globally as it looks to streamline operations and offset rising investments in artificial intelligence.

title: OpenAI says new model adept at making AI better
description: OpenAI released a new model it touts as its best yet for handling research work like making improved versions of itself, as rapid-fire releases by AI rivals pick up pace. According to OpenAI, artificial general intelligence in which computers think as well or better than people is no longer theoretical, and AI models that research how to essentially improve themselves take the world further in that direction.

title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese companies 'exploiting' AI models made in US
description: America is taking a strong stance against foreign tech firms, especially those in China, for allegedly stealing advanced artificial intelligence technology. The U.S. government plans to identify and penalize companies that extract capabilities from American AI systems. This move comes as China rapidly closes the gap in AI development.
